summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the category system upgrade from hardcoded to MongoDB-based. All 11 approved categories working correctly, including 4 new categories (Digital Marketing, Marketing & AI, Keywords & Search Strategy, Marketing Careers). Successfully tested suggest topic feature, moderation endpoints, and frontend integration.

fixed_issues.issue: Duplicate category suggestion detection was not working properly
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Enhanced duplicate detection to check both slug and name similarity

minor_issues.issue: Minor interaction issue with closing dropdown by clicking outside
minor_issues.impact: Does not affect functionality, purely cosmetic

passed_tests: User login with demo@b4b.com works correctly
GET /api/categories returns 11+ approved categories from MongoDB
All 4 new categories present: digital-marketing, marketing-and-ai, keywords, careers
GET /api/categories/{slug} returns category with subcategories
POST /api/categories/suggest creates pending categories correctly
GET /api/categories/pending/list returns pending categories
PUT /api/categories/{slug}/approve approves pending categories
Approved categories appear in main categories list
DELETE /api/categories/{slug}/reject removes pending categories
Duplicate category suggestion returns 400 error as expected
Homepage displays all 13 category cards in grid layout
Navbar 'Topics' dropdown shows all categories with post counts
Write page category dropdown includes all categories including new ones
Subcategory dropdowns appear and work correctly (tested with Marketing & AI)
'Suggest a Topic' dialog opens and accepts submissions
Topic suggestions submit successfully with success feedback
Duplicate suggestions show error handling
New category pages accessible (tested /category/digital-marketing)
Category pages display proper titles, descriptions, and subcategory filters
Navigation between pages works correctly
